name: Cocos Creator MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Cocos Creator MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Cocos Creator game engine — managing scene nodes and components, querying game assets and resources, executing editor commands, and integrating Cocos Creator's game development environment into agent-driven game development automation workflows.
use_cases: Managing scene hierarchy and node properties from game development agents
Querying and modifying game assets from game automation agents
Automating repetitive game content creation from level design agents
Generating game scripts and components from AI game development agents
Running editor commands and builds from CI/CD agents
Inspecting and debugging game scenes from QA agents
not_for: Teams using Unity, Unreal, or Godot (Cocos Creator specific)
Runtime game control (editor-time tool, not runtime game control)
best_when: An agent needs to assist with Cocos Creator game development — automating scene construction, asset management, or editor workflows within the Cocos Creator IDE.
avoid_when: You're using Unity, Unreal Engine, or Godot — or need runtime game control rather than editor-time automation.

auth.notes: No authentication — communicates with Cocos Creator editor running locally via its plugin API. Cocos Creator must be running with the MCP plugin installed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Cocos Creator: free for most uses (royalty-free for projects under $1M revenue)
pricing.paid_tiers: Cocos enterprise license for large studios
pricing.notes: Cocos Creator is free for indie developers (royalty-free below revenue threshold). Official MCP server from Cocos team is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local — limited by Cocos Creator editor API performance

known_agent_gotchas: Cocos Creator must be running with a project open and MCP plugin installed
Operations modify the active project immediately — no undo via MCP; use version control
Cocos Creator API is TypeScript/JavaScript — agents need game dev domain knowledge
Version compatibility: MCP may work only with specific Cocos Creator versions
Official Cocos MCP — higher quality than community alternatives but still newer project
Scene modifications require saving to persist — agents should explicitly save after changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Cocos Creator process. No external credentials. Official MCP from Cocos team. No secrets needed. Project files are modified locally — use version control for safety.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local editor process. No secrets. Official Cocos MCP. Use version control — operations modify project directly.
